featureDetection.rationale: Verifies element capabilities and adapts user instructions based on support status.

gracefulFallback.rationale: The scrollable layout remains perfectly interactive on all browser platforms.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Provides multi-variable option selectors and a live scroll logger mapping exact delta pixel movements.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: In-depth demonstration of nested scrolling behavior.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Strictly implements theme variable rules with excellent contrast.

references.rationale: Links to a related sub-feature at chromestatus.com/feature/5141288895873024.
